records.name: WIMA MKS2C031001A00KSSD 100 nF 63 V film capacitor
records.description: Concrete nonpolar metallized-polyester film capacitor for audio-rail bypass and output damping networks where stable effective capacitance is required.

companions.description: Pair the high-frequency film bypass with a voltage-, ripple-, ESR-, and lifetime-rated local bulk capacitor.

capacitor_evidence.review_note: WIMA MKS 2 dimensional and ordering data proves the concrete 100 nF, 63 V, 10 percent, 5 mm-pitch film part. Applied rail voltage remains a circuit-level derating gate.

records.name: Panasonic EEUFR1V221 220 uF 35 V low-ESR capacitor
records.description: Concrete polarized FR-series low-ESR aluminum electrolytic for local Class A and Class AB rail energy storage.

companions.description: Pair the bulk electrolytic with a stable-capacitance local high-frequency bypass.

esr.conditions: manufacturer maximum impedance used as a conservative ESR bound

capacitor_evidence.review_note: Panasonic EEUFR1V221 part and FR-A series data prove voltage, capacitance, impedance, ripple, dimensions, and 6000-hour endurance. Circuit validation must enforce polarity, voltage, ripple, temperature, and lifetime margin.

records.name: TI TLV1701AIDBVR high-voltage comparator
records.description: Active single rail-to-rail-input, open-collector comparator for wired-OR DC and supply-fault detection; generated schematics use KiCad's pin-compatible LMV331 symbol geometry while preserving TLV1701 component, value, rating, and datasheet identity.

companions.description: Place a 100 nF bypass directly across the comparator supply pins.

placement_hints.description: Keep high-impedance threshold nodes compact and separated from the relay output.

routing_hints.description: Separate threshold inputs from coil and speaker-current paths.

records.name: TI OPA134UA audio operational amplifier
records.description: Active single-channel FET-input audio op-amp with reviewed dual-rail, noise, distortion, drive, stability, and SOIC-8 pin-map evidence.

companions.description: Place low-inductance bypass capacitors directly between each supply and the signal-star return.
Leave KiCad's legacy OPA134 offset-trim symbol pins 1 and 8 explicitly unconnected; TI SBOS058B classifies pins 1, 5, and 8 as NC.

supply_voltage.conditions: TI OPA134 recommended total supply-voltage range

input_common_mode.conditions: Conservative bound from the specified common-mode range at plus/minus 15 V

output_swing.conditions: Conservative bound at the reviewed audio-driver load

output_current.conditions: Typical output-current capability; circuit validation applies a driver-current margin

opamp_evidence.review_note: TI SBOS058 provides the reviewed electrical limits. Applied gain, loading, decoupling, stability, and thermal margins remain circuit-level gates.

placement_hints.description: Keep both rail bypass loops short.

notes: TI SBOS058B marks pins 1, 5, and 8 NC. KiCad's legacy OPA134 symbol retains offset-trim names on pins 1 and 8, so those functions map to pads 1 and 8 and remain explicitly unconnected; hidden NC maps to pad 5.

records.name: onsemi D44H11G NPN audio power transistor
records.description: Concrete high-gain NPN half of the D44H11G/D45H11G complementary pair for power-amplifier output and driver stages.

companions.description: Emitter resistance and current sharing must be calculated for each parallel output device.

amplifier_output_evidence.review_note: Manufacturer electrical limits, Figure 9 forward-bias SOA, complementary identity, thermal paths, and TO-220 Style 1 pin map are reviewed.

max_voltage.conditions: VCEO sustaining voltage, IC=30 mA, IB=0

peak_current.conditions: pulse width at most 6 ms and duty cycle at most 50 percent

power_semiconductor_evidence.mounting_assumptions: Free-air operation uses the manufacturer's 62.5 C/W junction-to-ambient maximum; higher dissipation requires an explicit case-to-ambient assembly.
power_semiconductor_evidence.review_note: Source: onsemi D44H/D Rev. 14; conservative DC points lie within Figure 9 for D44H/45H10,11 at TC at most 70 C.

derating_rules.description: Validate the selected ambient or case thermal path at the declared dissipation.
Interpolate only inside the conservative catalog DC SOA boundary.

placement_hints.description: Preserve copper area and optional heatsink mounting access.

records.name: onsemi D45H11G PNP audio power transistor
records.description: Concrete high-gain PNP half of the D44H11G/D45H11G complementary pair for power-amplifier output and driver stages.

companions.description: Emitter resistance and current sharing must be calculated for each parallel output device.

amplifier_output_evidence.review_note: Manufacturer electrical limits, Figure 9 forward-bias SOA, complementary identity, thermal paths, and TO-220 Style 1 pin map are reviewed.

max_voltage.conditions: VCEO sustaining-voltage magnitude, IC=-30 mA, IB=0

peak_current.conditions: pulse-width at most 6 ms and duty cycle at most 50 percent; magnitude recorded

power_semiconductor_evidence.mounting_assumptions: Free-air operation uses the manufacturer's 62.5 C/W junction-to-ambient maximum; higher dissipation requires an explicit case-to-ambient assembly.
power_semiconductor_evidence.review_note: Source: onsemi D44H/D Rev. 14; conservative DC points lie within Figure 9 for D44H/45H10,11 at TC at most 70 C.

derating_rules.description: Validate the selected ambient or case thermal path at the declared dissipation.
Interpolate only inside the conservative catalog DC SOA boundary.

placement_hints.description: Preserve copper area and optional heatsink mounting access.

records.name: onsemi MJE243G NPN audio driver transistor
records.description: Active complementary NPN audio driver with reviewed TO-225 pin map, gain, thermal, and conservative DC SOA evidence.

companions.description: A local series base stopper is required between the bias network and the driver base to bound parasitic oscillation current.

continuous_current.conditions: Continuous collector current; applied thermal and SOA limits are circuit-level gates

power_semiconductor_evidence.mounting_assumptions: TO-225 free-air operation is permitted only when the circuit-level driver dissipation and ambient calculation remains inside the declared junction-temperature margin.
power_semiconductor_evidence.review_note: Conservative DC points are digitized inside the onsemi MJE243/D safe-operating-area graph.

placement_hints.description: Keep the driver loop short and thermally observable.

records.name: onsemi MJE253G PNP audio driver transistor
records.description: Active complementary PNP audio driver with reviewed TO-225 pin map, gain, thermal, and conservative DC SOA evidence.

companions.description: A local series base stopper is required between the bias network and the driver base to bound parasitic oscillation current.

max_voltage.conditions: VCEO magnitude at IC=-1 mA, IB=0

continuous_current.conditions: Continuous collector-current magnitude; applied thermal and SOA limits are circuit-level gates

power_semiconductor_evidence.mounting_assumptions: TO-225 free-air operation is permitted only when the circuit-level driver dissipation and ambient calculation remains inside the declared junction-temperature margin.
power_semiconductor_evidence.review_note: Conservative DC points are digitized inside the onsemi MJE243/D complementary safe-operating-area graph.

placement_hints.description: Keep the driver loop short and thermally observable.

records.name: Yageo RC0805FR-0747RL 47 ohm 0805 resistor
records.description: Concrete 1% thick-film series resistor for local transistor base and gate damping.

placement_hints.description: Place at the transistor base terminal so the un-damped conductor is minimal.

records.name: Vishay AC03 0.22 ohm 3 W wirewound resistor
records.description: Concrete flameproof axial emitter/current-sense resistor for low-power speaker output stages.

derating_rules.description: Use at most 3 W at 40 C and 2.5 W at 70 C, then apply the AC-series linear derating curve.

rated_power.conditions: AC03 nominal dissipation at free-air ambient up to 40 C

derated_power.conditions: AC-series datasheet derating table at 70 C ambient

resistor_evidence.review_note: Continuous audio and bounded short-circuit use is checked against the applied power points; pulse overload is not claimed.

placement_hints.description: Preserve airflow and Kelvin access at both resistor terminals.

records.name: Vishay AC03 10 ohm 3 W wirewound resistor
records.description: Concrete flameproof axial power resistor for speaker-output Zobel damping networks.

derating_rules.description: Use at most 3 W at 40 C and 2.5 W at 70 C, then apply the AC-series linear derating curve.

rated_power.conditions: AC03 nominal dissipation at free-air ambient up to 40 C

derated_power.conditions: AC-series datasheet derating table at 70 C ambient

resistor_evidence.review_note: Continuous Zobel dissipation is checked against the applied power points; pulse overload is not claimed.

placement_hints.description: Keep the Zobel loop local to the raw output return.

records.name: Panasonic AQY212GH PhotoMOS normally-open solid-state relay
records.description: Bidirectional 1 Form A PhotoMOS output isolator for low-quiescent delayed audio-output connection.

records.name: Omron G5Q-1A DC12 power relay
records.description: Normally-open 12 V coil relay with reviewed coil, contact, pin-map, package, and active-family evidence for speaker isolation.

companions.description: A rated low-side coil driver is required so the timing detector does not source relay current.
A local reverse-biased diode clamp is required across the relay coil.

placement_hints.description: Separate the coil/contact loop from the input and feedback network.

routing_hints.description: Route both contact pads for the declared peak speaker current.

records.name: onsemi NJW0281G NPN audio power transistor
records.description: Concrete NPN half of the NJW0281G/NJW0302G complementary high-fidelity audio output pair.

companions.description: Emitter resistance and current sharing must be calculated for the selected output stage.

amplifier_output_evidence.review_note: Manufacturer ratings, TO-3P pinmap, complementary pairing, thermal resistance, and conservative DC SOA boundary are captured; applied heatsink and fault validation remain circuit-level gates.

power_semiconductor_evidence.mounting_assumptions: Conservative points inside Figure 2 DC SOA at TC=25 C; circuit validation must derate for actual case temperature and heatsink path.

derating_rules.description: Derate the 25 C case rating through the declared interface and heatsink thermal path.
Interpolate only inside the conservative catalog DC SOA boundary and derate for case temperature.

placement_hints.description: Place against the declared heatsink edge and preserve mounting access.

routing_hints.description: Use the calculated output-current net class.

records.name: onsemi NJW0302G PNP audio power transistor
records.description: Concrete PNP half of the NJW0281G/NJW0302G complementary high-fidelity audio output pair.

companions.description: Emitter resistance and current sharing must be calculated for the selected output stage.

amplifier_output_evidence.review_note: Manufacturer ratings, TO-3P pinmap, complementary pairing, thermal resistance, and conservative DC SOA boundary are captured; applied heatsink and fault validation remain circuit-level gates.

power_semiconductor_evidence.mounting_assumptions: Conservative points inside Figure 2 DC SOA at TC=25 C; circuit validation must derate for actual case temperature and heatsink path.

derating_rules.description: Derate the 25 C case rating through the declared interface and heatsink thermal path.
Interpolate only inside the conservative catalog DC SOA boundary and derate for case temperature.

placement_hints.description: Place against the declared heatsink edge and preserve mounting access.

routing_hints.description: Use the calculated output-current net class.

records.name: Vishay IRFP240 N-channel power MOSFET
records.description: Concrete TO-247 N-channel power MOSFET with quantitative switching-device evidence; linear audio use remains fail-closed pending a reviewed DC SOA boundary.

companions.description: A calculated local gate-stopper resistor is required for power MOSFET amplifier use.

amplifier_output_evidence.review_note: Pinmap and quantitative ratings are proven; this switching MOSFET is blocked for linear amplifier selection until its graphical SOA is reviewed and conservatively digitized.

peak_current.conditions: repetitive pulse limited by maximum junction temperature

power_semiconductor_evidence.mounting_assumptions: TO-247AC case-to-sink interface and heatsink are circuit-level inputs.
power_semiconductor_evidence.review_note: Source: Vishay IRFP240 document 91210 Rev. C. Linear audio operation is intentionally not proven.

records.name: Vishay IRFP9240 P-channel power MOSFET
records.description: Concrete TO-247 P-channel power MOSFET with quantitative switching-device evidence; linear audio use remains fail-closed pending a reviewed DC SOA boundary.

companions.description: A calculated local gate-stopper resistor is required for power MOSFET amplifier use.

amplifier_output_evidence.review_note: Pinmap and quantitative ratings are proven; this switching MOSFET is blocked for linear amplifier selection until its graphical SOA is reviewed and conservatively digitized.

continuous_current.conditions: VGS=-10V, case temperature 25 C; magnitude recorded

peak_current.conditions: repetitive pulse limited by maximum junction temperature; magnitude recorded

power_semiconductor_evidence.mounting_assumptions: TO-247AC case-to-sink interface and heatsink are circuit-level inputs.
power_semiconductor_evidence.review_note: Source: Vishay IRFP9240 document 91239 Rev. C. Linear audio operation is intentionally not proven.

records.name: Littelfuse SMBJ18CA 18 V bidirectional TVS diode
records.description: Concrete 600 W bidirectional TVS diode for protected ground-referenced power and audio outputs whose valid signal envelope remains within 18 V.

records.name: Littelfuse SMBJ20CA 20 V bidirectional TVS diode
records.description: Concrete 600 W bidirectional TVS diode for protected ground-referenced power and audio outputs whose valid signal envelope remains within 20 V.
